description: A complete cooking recipe extracted from a cooking-tutorial video, including ingredients with quantities, the ordered cooking process, and tips.

dish.description: Name of the dish (transliterate if the video is not in English)

servings.description: How many it serves, or what it is served with, if stated

ingredients.description: Every ingredient with its exact quantity as spoken in the narration or shown on screen.

quantity.description: Exact amount with unit (e.g. '250 g', '1 tsp', '2 medium'); 'to taste' / 'as needed' if that is what was said

group.description: Optional sub-grouping if the recipe separates them (e.g. 'marinade', 'gravy', 'tempering')

seconds.description: Timestamp in seconds where the step starts

action.description: What to do in this step

time_minutes.description: Cooking/resting time for this step in minutes, if stated

tips.description: Techniques or tips the cook gives for a better result.
